goal: Add a side-effect-free receipt preflight builder that validates release-governance approved-action consume execution authority is ready for later receipt recording while keeping action consume, receipt recording, merge, external actions, GitHub, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume actions, record receipts, merge, create PRs, call GitHub, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready release-governance approved-action consume execution authority can be preflighted for later receipt recording without executing it.
Receipt ref, recorder ref, and receipt policy ref are required.
Action consume, receipt recording, merge, and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Actual action consumption, receipt recording, PR work, and merge require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing receipt ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Action consumption, receipt recording, merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, external actions, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-138 recorded side-effect-free release-governance approved-action consume execution authorization without consuming the action or merging.
